prompt: Generate a fashion photograph of a slim brunette woman in her late 20s wearing the exact dress from the reference images — red and white vertical pinstripe cotton maxi dress with gathered scoop neckline, small flat bow tie at centre front (fully closed, no gap, no keyhole), smocked elastic waist, tiered ruffled skirt, wide shoulder straps. She is standing at a Mediterranean harbour waterfront, leaning casually against a stone bollard, yachts and blue water in background, bright midday sun, shallow depth of field. She is looking off to the side, relaxed expression, wearing sunglasses. Full length shot showing the whole dress. Photorealistic, editorial fashion photography quality.
